description: Claude Code usage analytics built on Loki LogQL. Tracks cost, tokens, API requests, tool usage, sessions, productivity metrics, cache efficiency, and error details. Data sourced from Claude Code OTel logs via OpenTelemetry Collector.

panels.description: Total estimated cost in USD across all API requests
panels.title: Total Cost

panels.description: Total unique sessions observed
panels.title: Total Sessions

panels.description: Total user prompts submitted
panels.title: User Prompts

panels.description: Total API requests to Claude
panels.title: API Requests

panels.description: Total API errors
panels.title: API Errors

panels.description: Total tool invocations
panels.title: Tool Invocations

panels.description: Percentage of API errors over total API requests
panels.title: Error Rate

panels.description: Average cost per user prompt
panels.title: Avg Cost per Prompt

panels.description: Estimated USD saved by prompt cache
panels.title: Cache Savings (est.)

panels.description: Cost breakdown by model over time
panels.title: Cost by Model Over Time

panels.description: Token usage by type (input, output, cache read, cache creation) over time
panels.title: Token Usage by Type Over Time

panels.description: Total tokens consumed per model

targets.expr:
sum by (model) (sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap input_tokens [$__auto]))
+
sum by (model) (sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap output_tokens [$__auto]))

panels.title: Token Usage by Model

panels.description: Total cost per model
panels.title: Cost by Model

panels.description: API request distribution across models
panels.title: API Requests by Model

panels.description: Ratio of cache_read_tokens to total input tokens (higher = better cache utilisation)

targets.expr:
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap cache_read_tokens [$__auto]))
/
(
  sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap input_tokens [$__auto]))
  +
  sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap cache_read_tokens [$__auto]))
  +
  sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap cache_creation_tokens [$__auto]))
)
* 100

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio

panels.description: Output tokens generated per user prompt (higher = more productive responses)
panels.title: Token Efficiency (Output / Prompt)

panels.description: Average cost per session

targets.expr:
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap cost_usd [$__auto]))
/
count(count by (session_id) (count_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` [$__auto])))

panels.title: Avg Cost per Session

panels.description: Average API request latency in milliseconds
panels.title: Avg API Latency

panels.description: Cache hit ratio trend over time — higher values mean better prompt caching

targets.expr:
sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap cache_read_tokens [$__auto]))
/
(
  sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap input_tokens [$__auto]))
  +
  sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap cache_read_tokens [$__auto]))
  +
  sum(sum_over_time({service_name="claude-code"} | event_name = `api_request` | unwrap cache_creation_tokens [$__auto]))
)
* 100

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio Over Time
